---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: hero-wrapper
::: hero-text
# Connor Conkey-Morrison

::: hero-tags
[PhD Candidate]{.tag} [Provisional Psychologist]{.tag} [Sessional Academic]{.tag} [School Counsellor]{.tag}
:::

::: hero-bio
I research school attendance problems and emotionally based school avoidance (EBSA) --- why children disengage from school, what interventions work, and how disengagement develops across childhood and adolescence. My work combines systematic review methods, longitudinal cohort modelling, and population-level education data.
:::

::: hero-links
[Research →](pages/research.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-primary} [Education & Experience →](pages/history.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-secondary} [Get in touch →](pages/contact.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::

::: hero-photo
![Connor Conkey-Morrison](images/crop_27A5334.jpg){.profile-img}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-section
## About

I am a PhD candidate at RMIT University (School of Health and Biomedical Sciences), supervised by Dr Daniel Zarate, Dr Vasileios Stavropoulos, Dr Taylor Brown, and Dr Vince Rizzo. My dissertation is structured around three interlinked papers: a systematic review and meta-analysis of EBSA interventions (PROSPERO registered), a longitudinal trajectory analysis using the Longitudinal Study of Australian Children (LSAC, Wave 10 restricted access), and a population-level analysis linking ACARA attendance data.

Alongside the PhD, I work as a provisional psychologist at CatholicCare Victoria, a school counsellor at Sacred Heart Primary School (Kew), and a sessional academic at RMIT University and the Cairnmillar Institute. I am also completing a Masters systematic review on CBT adaptations for autistic adolescents.

My broader research interests include problematic social media use, coping processes, and network analytic methods.
:::

::: stats-strip
::: stat-item
**4**\
peer-reviewed publications
:::
::: stat-item
**2024--2025**\
active publication period
:::
::: stat-item
**3**\
PhD papers in progress
:::
::: stat-item
**PROSPERO**\
registered review
:::
:::

::: cards-grid
::: card
### Research & Publications

Published work: social media, coping, and gaming. Works in progress: systematic review of EBSA interventions, longitudinal trajectory modelling with LSAC, population-level attendance analysis.

[Read more →](pages/research.qmd)
:::

::: card
### Education & Experience

Sessional teaching at RMIT and Cairnmillar Institute. School counselling at Sacred Heart Primary School, Kew. Full education history.

[Where have I been? →](pages/history.qmd)
:::

::: card
### Contact

Current appointments, academic profiles, and contact details.

[Get in touch →](pages/contact.qmd)
:::
:::
